_comment: This is the hooks block DevBrain adds to ~/.claude/settings.json
_comment2: If install.sh/install.ps1 could not auto-merge, add the 'hooks' key below into your existing settings.json
_comment3: If you already have a 'hooks' key, merge SessionStart and SessionEnd into it alongside your existing hooks
_unix_paths: Use these command values on macOS / Linux / WSL
_windows_paths: Use these command values on native Windows (PowerShell) — note ~\.claude, not %APPDATA%\Claude
